summary: Completed testing of PDF download and Print dialog fixes. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Download PDF button triggers file download, Print button opens print dialog (react-to-print v3 fix working).

Backend: generate_pdf_content() calls WeasyPrint synchronously (no asyncio event loop)

Frontend: printRef attached to invoice preview container
Frontend: Download PDF button triggers file download with success toast

Print button onClick handler fixed from onClick={handlePrint} to onClick={() => handlePrint()} per react-to-print v3 API
